MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-28-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED AS REQUESTED. THERE SHALL BE NO MORE SHORT-TERM RENTAL OCCUPANTS AT THE SUBJECT PREMISES. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE NOTICE TO ALL SHORT-TERM RENTAL INDIVIDUALS WITH EXISTING BOOKINGS OF THIS INJUNCTION NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 1, 2016. PLAINFITFF SHALL POST AN UNDERTAKING IN THE AMOUNT OF $15,000.00. SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS. ORDER SIGNED IN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Erin Daly,(415)984-9637 Jeffer Mangels Butler & Mitchell LLP for Plaintiff/Moving party Eagle Vista Equities, LLC.
Christopher Wimmer, (415) 894-9284 for Defendant/Opposing party David Bryan.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED as requested.
There shall be no more short-term rental occupants at the subject premises. Defendant shall provide notice to all short-term rental individuals with existing bookings of this injunction no later than February 1, 2016. Plainfitff shall post an undertaking in the amount of $15,000.00. See Scanned order for details. Order signed in Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
